1030701.name: Om Nom Nom
1030701.desc:
If this unit's Skill Slot has [Aggro], Clash Power +1
Heal 4 HP every time this unit hits enemies that targeted this unit with an Attack Skill in the Chaining Phase (For Abnormalities, the Parts that targeted this unit with an Attack Skill)

1030711.name: Om Nom Nom
1030711.desc:
If this unit's Skill Slot has [Aggro], Clash Power +1
Heal 6 HP every time this unit hits enemies that targeted this unit with an Attack Skill in the Chaining Phase (For Abnormalities, each Part is calculated separately)

1030721.name: Illumilantern
1030721.desc: The ally with the highest [Aggro] Skill Slot heals 2 HP every time they hit an enemy that targets this unit (Does not apply to units without [Aggro])

1030731.name: Illumilantern
1030731.desc: The ally with the highest [Aggro] Skill Slot heals 4 HP every time they hit an enemy that targets this unit (Does not apply to units without [Aggro])
